title: Fluffy Uruguayan Chicken Wrap
description: A tangy, high‑protein wrap that combines blanched chicken, a creamy garlic‑lime sauce, and fresh veggies for a crowd‑pleasing, fluffy finish.
instructions: In a bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, minced garlic, lime juice, salt, pepper, and chopped cilantro to make the garlic‑lime sauce. Set aside.
Boil a pot of salted water. Add chicken breasts and blanch for 2 minutes, then remove and allow to cool slightly before dicing or shredding.
In a separate bowl, combine diced chicken, plain yogurt, beaten egg, egg whites, baking powder, paprika, salt, and pepper. Mix gently until the mixture is light and slightly airy.
Heat olive oil in a non‑stick skillet over medium‑high heat. Add the chicken‑yogurt mixture and cook, stirring occasionally, until golden and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Warm the tortillas by placing each on a dry skillet for 20–30 seconds per side.
Spread a generous amount of garlic‑lime sauce over the center of each tortilla. Layer with shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, sliced red onion, and pickled cucumber if using.
Top with the fluffy chicken mixture, then fold the sides in and roll tightly to enclose the filling.
Optional: return the assembled wrap to the skillet for 1–2 minutes per side to crisp the tortilla slightly.
Serve immediately with lime wedges on the side for an extra burst of tang.
